subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Ibn-i-Abhar
subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast arisen to serve the Covenant! That which thou didst write hath been perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من قام علی خدمه المیثاق آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @education of children; moral education, @predictions and prophecies
